action.reasoning: Observation: Environment works. Nodes have utility, neighbors are reachable nodes. Sample shows utility-based greedy is feasible. Decision: Build a strong heuristic baseline first - greedy nearest frontier or utility-based with cost. Submit eval to get baseline score and iteration time.
